name: Glasgow Metal End Table Black - Threshold™: Modern Square Design, No Assembly Required
description:
Add sleek, modern style to your space with this Glasgow Metal End Table from Threshold™. Crafted from metal in a solid hue, this end table sports a clean silhouette and a rectangular tabletop for a sleek look that instantly elevates any setting in your home. The end table features a spacious tabletop to display your favorite decor, along with a lower shelf to provide additional storage space you'll appreciate. Place it next to your sofa in your living room or alongside your chair to rest your book, cup of tea, small potted plant or a lamp.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
